reason_required: The accepted two-part N29 transportability gate failed in app-a1-source-delta-audit.json.

source_roles.E: N29 I14.2-3 negative capacity changes with explicit leakage-gated producer debt retained
source_roles.R: N29 I14.5-2 later 0.82 retained response to the G+E+P changed medium

grounding_boundary.proposed_use_of_n29_numbers: prospective source-grounded operational embedding, not transported measurement equivalence or independent replication
grounding_boundary.required_disclosure_if_accepted: A positive APP-A2 result would demonstrate the executable shared-carrier composition of the frozen source-grounded operation geometry; it would not convert the N29 artifact gates into native LGRC observables.

proposed_measurement_domain.runtime: one fresh source-current LGRC9V3 model per arm
proposed_measurement_domain.reference_rule: Each arm is compared only with its matched reference runtime at the same registered pre-R and post-R event frontiers.
proposed_measurement_domain.response_rule: R is a passive noncontributor target. Native causal-flux production reads only registered carrier-node coherence and schedules amount_fraction=0.82 packets after the operation sequence.
proposed_measurement_domain.metric_observer_rule: Read-only experiment analysis derives metrics exclusively from native state snapshots, packet/event receipts, and the matched reference; it cannot schedule, mutate, or synthesize R.

retention_configuration_identity.role: required identical configuration in every evaluable arm, not a measured success gate

environment_feedback.definition: environment-axis R packet mass in arm minus matched-reference environment-axis R packet mass
environment_feedback.source_anchor: N29 I14.5-2 minimum environment feedback delta

support_feedback.definition: support-axis R packet mass in arm minus matched-reference support-axis R packet mass
support_feedback.source_anchor: N29 I14.5-2 minimum support feedback delta

phase_residual.definition: maximum over the four axes of abs((arm pre-R carrier coherence minus matched-reference pre-R carrier coherence) minus (arm R packet mass minus matched-reference R packet mass))
phase_residual.source_anchor: N29 I14.5-2 maximum buffered phase residual

registered_route_merge_leakage.definition: (unregistered packet mass touching the shared-carrier scope plus absolute native budget error) divided by max(1, total registered common-carrier packet mass)
registered_route_merge_leakage.source_anchor: N29 bounded merge/leakage guard, redefined prospectively for the live packet domain

proposed_scientific_rule_if_accepted.complete_arm: GEP must be operationally valid, preserve the retention configuration identity, and pass all four live-domain gates.
proposed_scientific_rule_if_accepted.proper_subsets: Every operationally valid member of reference/G/E/P/GE/GP/EP must preserve the same retention configuration identity and fail at least one live-domain gate.
proposed_scientific_rule_if_accepted.nonevaluable_rule: Invalid operation receipts, configuration drift, missing matched reference, missing carrier continuity, or incomplete gate data make an arm nonevaluable and cannot establish subset insufficiency.
proposed_scientific_rule_if_accepted.causal_rule: Each G/E/P withdrawal must alter R directly or alter a registered mediator whose independent intervention alters R; carrier clamp must alter R.
proposed_scientific_rule_if_accepted.runtime_requirement: Only fresh live PyGRC runtime receipts can satisfy the rule. Source arithmetic and deterministic prediction are design context, not evidence.

review_choice.acceptance_effect: Authorize APP-A1 to bind this gate authority, then proceed to the exact fixture/control freeze and candidate-free conformance in the already accepted hard order.
review_choice.rejection_effect: Keep APP-A1 failed closed and revise or abandon the prospective live-domain gate authority without runtime execution.
